sections.title: Technique
sections.default: AP and lateral views of the {laterality} hip were obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The femoral head is well-contained within the acetabulum. The joint space is maintained symmetrically. No fracture is identified. The femoral neck appears intact and of normal density. The greater and lesser trochanters are intact. No periarticular calcification or soft tissue swelling.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the {laterality} hip.

few_shot_normal.input: hip joint normal, femoral head contained, no fracture

output.findings: The femoral head is well-contained within the acetabulum. The joint space is maintained symmetrically. No fracture is identified. The femoral neck appears intact and of normal density. The greater and lesser trochanters are intact. No periarticular calcification.
output.impression: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the hip.
